AbsoluteRatePerSecondCapUpdated(uint8,ui.details: Emitted when a pair's funding rate % per second absolute cap is updated

AbsoluteVelocityPerYearCapUpdated(uint8,.details: Emitted when a pair's absolute velocity per year cap is updated

AccessControlUpdated(address,uint8,bool).details: Emitted when access control is updated for an account

params.access: whether role is granted or revoked

AlreadyTransferredNegativePnlStored(addr.details: Emitted when a trade's already transferred negative pnl is stored

params.deltaCollateral: delta in collateral tokens to store (collateral precision)
params.newAlreadyTransferredNegativePnlCollater: new already transferred negative pnl in collateral tokens (collateral precision)

AprMultiplierEnabledUpdated(uint8,uint16.details: Emitted when a pair's APR multiplier is enabled/disabled

BorrowingRatePerSecondPUpdated(uint8,uin.details: Emitted when a pair's borrowing rate % per second is updated

FundingFeesEnabledUpdated(uint8,uint16,b.details: Emitted when a pair's funding fees are enabled/disabled

HoldingFeesChargedOnTrade(uint8,address,.details: Emitted when holding fees are realized (charged) on an open trade

params.amountSentToVaultCollateral: amount sent to vault in collateral tokens (collateral precision)
params.availableCollateralInDiamond: trade available collateral in diamond contract (collateral precision)
params.newRealizedPnlCollateral: new realized pnl in collateral tokens (collateral precision)
params.newRealizedTradingFeesCollateral: new realized trading fees in collateral tokens (collateral precision)
params.tradeHoldingFees: trade holding fees in collateral tokens (collateral precision)

HoldingFeesRealizedOnTrade(uint8,address.details: Emitted when holding fees are realized (earned) on an open trade

params.newRealizedPnlCollateral: new realized pnl value for trade in collateral tokens (collateral precision)
params.tradeHoldingFees: trade holding fees in collateral tokens (collateral precision)

Initialized(uint8).details: Triggered when the contract has been initialized or reinitialized.

ManuallyRealizedNegativePnlCollateralSto.details: Emitted when negative pnl is manually realized on an open trade

params.newManuallyRealizedNegativePnlCollateral: new manually realized negative pnl in collateral tokens (collateral precision)

MaxSkewCollateralUpdated(uint8,uint16,ui.details: Emitted when a pair's max skew collateral is updated

ParamUpdateRequested(uint8,uint16,uint8,.details: Emitted when a param update is requested

PendingAccBorrowingFeesStored(uint8,uint.details: Emitted when a pair's pending acc borrowing fees are stored

PendingAccFundingFeesStored(uint8,uint16.details: Emitted when a pair's pending acc funding fees are stored

PnlRealizedOnOpenTrade(address,uint32,in.details: Emitted when pnl is realized on an open trade

params.newRealizedPnlCollateral: new realized pnl value for trade in collateral tokens (collateral precision)
params.pnlCollateral: pnl realized in collateral tokens (collateral precision)

SkewCoefficientPerYearUpdated(uint8,uint.details: Emitted when a pair's skew coefficient per year is updated

ThetaThresholdUsdUpdated(uint8,uint16,ui.details: Emitted when a pair's theta USD threshold is updated

TradeFeesDataDownscaled(address,uint32,u.details: Emitted when a trade's realized pnl and available in diamond is scaled down

TradeInitialAccFeesStored(address,uint32.details: Emitted when a trade's initial acc fees are stored or reset

params.long: true if long, false if short

TradingFeesRealized(uint8,address,uint32.details: Emitted when trading fees are realized on an open trade

params.amountSentFromVaultCollateral: amount sent from vault in collateral tokens (collateral precision)
params.finalTradingFeesCollateral: trading fees realized in collateral tokens (collateral precision)
params.newRealizedFeesCollateral: new realized fees value for trade in collateral tokens (collateral precision)
params.newRealizedPnlCollateral: new realized pnl value for trade in collateral tokens (collateral precision)
params.tradingFeesCollateral: trading fees input in collateral tokens (collateral precision)

VirtualAvailableCollateralInDiamondStore.details: Emitted when a trade's virtual available collateral in diamond is stored

params.currentManuallyRealizedNegativePnlCollat: current manually realized negative pnl collateral value (collateral precision)
params.manuallyRealizedNegativePnlCollateralCap: whether manually realized negative pnl collateral value was capped (collateral precision)
params.newVirtualAvailableCollateralInDiamond: new virtual available collateral in diamond (collateral precision)
params.virtualAvailableCollateralInDiamondDelta: virtual available collateral in diamond delta to keep available collateral in diamond >= 0 (collateral precision)

downscaleTradeFeesData(address,uint32,ui.details: Decreases a trade's realized pnl and available collateral in diamond proportionally to size delta ratio over full size (for partial closes with collateral delta > 0)

params._newCollateralAmount: new trade collateral amount after partial close (collateral precision)

getMaxSkewCollateral(uint8,uint16).details: Returns max skew in collateral tokens for a pair (1e10)

getPairBorrowingFeeData(uint8[],uint16[].details: Returns borrowing fee data for pairs

getPairBorrowingFeeParams(uint8[],uint16.details: Returns borrowing fee params for pairs

getPairFundingFeeData(uint8[],uint16[]).details: Returns funding fee data for pairs

getPairFundingFeeParams(uint8[],uint16[].details: Returns funding fee params for pairs

getPairGlobalParamsArray(uint8[],uint16[.details: Returns max skew in collateral tokens for pairs (1e10)

getPairPendingAccBorrowingFees(uint8,uin.details: Returns pending acc borrowing fees for a pair

getPairPendingAccFundingFees(uint8,uint1.details: Returns pending acc funding fees for a pair

returns.accFundingFeeLongP: pending acc funding fee % for longs (1e20)
returns.accFundingFeeShortP: pending acc funding fee % for shorts (1e20)

getTradeBorrowingFeesCollateral(address,.details: Returns pending borrowing fees in collateral tokens for an open trade (collateral precision)

getTradeFundingFeesCollateral(address,ui.details: Returns pending funding fees in collateral tokens for an open trade (collateral precision)

getTradeManuallyRealizedNegativePnlColla.details: Returns trade manually realized negative pnl in collateral tokens (collateral precision)

getTradePendingHoldingFeesCollateral(add.details: Returns trade pending funding fees, borrowing fees, old borrowing fees, and total holding fees in collateral tokens (collateral precision)

returns.tradeHoldingFees: trade holding fees in collateral tokens (collateral precision)

getTradeRealizedPnlCollateral(address,ui.details: Returns realized pnl in collateral tokens for an open trade

returns.realizedPnlCollateral: realized pnl in collateral tokens (collateral precision)
returns.realizedTradingFeesCollateral: realized trading fees in collateral tokens (collateral precision)
returns.totalRealizedPnlCollateral: total realized pnl in collateral tokens (collateral precision)

getTradeRealizedTradingFeesCollateral(ad.details: Returns realized trading fees in collateral tokens for an open trade (collateral precision)

getTradeUiRealizedPnlDataArray(address[].details: Returns UI realized pnl data for trades

hasRole(address,uint8).details: Returns whether an account has been granted a particular role

hasRoles(address,uint8,uint8).details: Returns whether an account has been granted at least one of two roles

params._govEmergencyTimelock: address to be granted emergency timelock role

paramUpdateCallbackWithSignedPrices((uin.details: Executes pending param update callback using signed prices stored in initial context call

realizeHoldingFeesOnOpenTrade(address,ui.details: Realizes pending holding fees on an open trade

realizePnlOnOpenTrade(address,uint32,int.details: Realizes pnl on an open trade

params._pnlCollateral: pnl to realize in collateral tokens (collateral precision)

realizeTradingFeesOnOpenTrade(address,ui.details: Realizes trading fees on an open trade

params._feesCollateral: trading fees to charge in collateral tokens (collateral precision)

returns.finalFeesCollateral: trading fees charged in collateral tokens (collateral precision), same as input unless liquidated then 0

setAbsoluteRatePerSecondCap(uint8[],uint.details: Updates funding rate % per second absolute cap for pairs

setAbsoluteVelocityPerYearCap(uint8[],ui.details: Updates absolute funding velocity per year cap for pairs

setBorrowingRatePerSecondP(uint8[],uint1.details: Updates a pair's borrowing rate % per second

setMaxSkewCollateral(uint8[],uint16[],ui.details: Updates max skew in collateral tokens for pairs

setRoles(address[],uint8[],bool[]).details: Updates access control for a list of accounts

setSkewCoefficientPerYear(uint8[],uint16.details: Updates funding skew coefficient per year for pairs

setThetaThresholdUsd(uint8[],uint16[],ui.details: Updates funding theta threshold for pairs

storeAlreadyTransferredNegativePnl(addre.details: Stores already transferred negative pnl for a trade (for partial closes with leverage delta > 0 and negative PnL)

params._deltaCollateral: delta in collateral tokens to store (collateral precision)

storeManuallyRealizedNegativePnlCollater.details: Stores trade manually realized negative pnl in collateral tokens

params._amountCollateral: new amount of realized negative pnl in collateral tokens (collateral precision)

storeTradeInitialAccFees(address,uint32,.details: Stores initial acc funding / borrowing fees for a tradeHAS TO BE CALLED when a new trade is opened or when a trade's position size changes (+ store pending holding fees until now separately)

params._long: true if long, false if short

storeUiPnlWithdrawnCollateral(address,ui.details: Stores UI withdrawn pnl for a trade

params._deltaCollateral: pnl withdrawn in collateral tokens (collateral precision)

storeUiRealizedPnlPartialCloseCollateral.details: Stores UI partial close realized pnl for a trade

params._deltaCollateral: raw pnl realized in collateral tokens (collateral precision)

storeUiRealizedTradingFeesCollateral(add.details: Stores UI realized trading fees for a trade

params._deltaCollateral: realized trading fees in collateral tokens (collateral precision)

storeVirtualAvailableCollateralInDiamond.details: Stores virtual available collateral in diamond to compensate if available in diamond would be < 0 without it (for collateral withdrawals)
